description_long: This is a richly detailed, vintage-style brown leather couch with ornate wooden carvings along the top of the backrest and the front skirt. The seat features three separate, thick leather cushions, while the backrest is deeply tufted with a diamond pattern, adding a luxurious texture. The armrests are wide and padded, curving outward slightly for comfort and style. The legs are exposed, carved, and cabriole-shaped, matching the decorative woodwork on the upper backrest. The rear of the couch is fully upholstered in smooth brown leather, with no visible seams or interruptions. The overall design suggests a classic, antique aesthetic suitable for upscale urban environments such as hotel lobbies, historic parks, or stylish sidewalk cafes.
description: A vintage brown leather couch with ornate wood carvings, tufted backrest, and three seat cushions. Features wide padded arms and carved cabriole legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat cushions, tufted backrest, ornate wood carvings, and wide padded armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the curve of the armrest, and the profile of the carved leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted brown leather upholstery and the decorative wooden crest along the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and leg details seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three separate, rectangular seat cushions; backrest is a single, continuous, deeply tufted cushion; no accent or throw pillows visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid brown leather with a diamond-tufted pattern on the backrest and smooth leather on the seat and rear surfaces.
attribute_leg_style: Exposed, carved wooden cabriole legs with ornate detailing; medium height and visually prominent.
attribute_armrest_design: Wide, padded armrests with a slight outward curve; fully upholstered in brown leather and integrated into the frame.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with deep diamond tufting and an ornate carved wooden crest along the top.
